body_txt: The protagonist has developed a reputation, and some con artist tries to use it to rip off people who have heard of, but never met, the protagonist. Fortunately, the real deal happens along in time to straighten things out. Related to Costume Copycat , but not necessarily involving a costume. The Real Remington Steele is when the copycat is doing so off of a seemingly fictional or at least legendary persona (which often just so happens to be the Secret Identity of a main character). When the real deal meets the impostor, expect Confronting Your Imposter to occur. One Sub-Trope is the God Guise . See also Fake Ultimate Hero , Famed in Story , Mistaken for Special Guest .
